TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1920, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 6, Bob Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1993,ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10,Armstrong htgan na ryax maki Marietta, Georgia. kawas tay 1960,Armstrong trang mrkyas ga maki mhetay beh Amirika. kawas tay 1962,taring mtzyaw beh kpyuci puniq. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 8(80kawas), tlu yaqeh na nbu wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **,arms~ɕtroŋ ħtɣan na rjax maki marietta, ɣeorɣia. kawas~ɕ taj ****,arms~ɕtroŋ traŋ mrkjas~ɕ ɣa maki mħetaj βeħ amirika. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tariŋ mtzjaw βeħ kpjuʦ~ʨi puniq. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *(**kawas~ɕ), tlu jaqeħ na nβu wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bob Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1920, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 6, Bob Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1993,ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 10,Armstrong htgan na ryax maki Marietta, Georgia. kawas tay 1960,Armstrong trang mrkyas ga maki mhetay beh Amirika. kawas tay 1962,taring mtzyaw beh kpyuci puniq. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 8(80kawas), tlu yaqeh na nbu wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **,arms~ɕtroŋ ħtɣan na rjax maki marietta, ɣeorɣia. kawas~ɕ taj ****,arms~ɕtroŋ traŋ mrkjas~ɕ ɣa maki mħetaj βeħ amirika. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tariŋ mtzjaw βeħ kpjuʦ~ʨi puniq. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *(**kawas~ɕ), tlu jaqeħ na nβu wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
